revoke.meta_description: View and revoke ERC-20 token spending approvals on Arbitrum. Stay in control of your wallet security.
revoke.title: Approval Manager
revoke.subtitle: Review and revoke ERC-20 spending approvals you have granted on Arbitrum.
revoke.connect_wallet_description: Connect your wallet to scan for active ERC-20 token approvals on Arbitrum.
revoke.scanning_description: Querying Arbitrum for your approval history.
revoke.no_approvals_description: Your wallet has no active ERC-20 spending approvals on Arbitrum.
revoke.batch_revoke_description: Revoke {count} approvals in sequence. You will confirm each transaction in your wallet.
revoke.risk_explanation_high: Unlimited approval granted to an unknown contract. High risk — if this contract is compromised, all your tokens could be drained.
revoke.risk_explanation_medium: Either an unlimited amount or an unverified spender. Review carefully before keeping.
revoke.risk_explanation_low: Limited approval to a known protocol. Lower risk, but still worth reviewing periodically.
